{{Quote|Black armor? Not again…|Kyle Katarn|audio=KyleBlackArmor-JO.flac|<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />}}
'''Shadowtroopers''' were [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]-[[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] hybrid soldiers created by the Dark [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Desann]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Galak Fyyar]] on behalf of [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Hethrir]]'s [[Empire Reborn]]. Similar to the [[Reborn]] soldiers, Desann used the [[Valley of the Jedi]] to imbue stormtroopers with [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]].

==Equipment and abilities==
[[File:Shadowtrooper-JO.jpg|left|thumb|A shadowtrooper with an [[Artusian crystal]] embedded in his [[Shadow armor|armor's]] chest plate and a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in hand.|229x229px]]
Shadowtroopers were armed with [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] powered by synthetic [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] crystals. An [[Artusian crystal]] was embedded in the armor's chest plate to enhance the power granted from the [[Valley of the Jedi|valley]].<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />

Shadow armor also had limited optical stealth capabilities via [[Stealth field generator/Legends|personal cloaking]], similar to an [[Imperial Saboteur]], although a translucent bluish silhouette was visible when the trooper moved. The armor was constructed out of [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]], a rare mineral capable of resisting lightsabers. This made them tougher to defeat in lightsaber combat.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />

Their artificial empowering of the Force enabled them to use the basics of [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Grip|Force Grip]] and [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]], but not to a very high standard, and saber combat was their preferred choice. Unlike the Reborn warriors, shadowtroopers did not [[Dun Möch/Legends|taunt]] their enemies, preferring instead to remain quiet and concentrate on physical combat. The shadowtroopers were competent duelists, possessing more skill than their Reborn counterparts, and often used the Strong Style of lightsaber combat mixed with other types. This allowed them to put up better fights against Jedi.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />

==History==
[[File:Katarn_shadowtrooper.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Kyle Katarn]] fighting a shadowtrooper.]]
The project behind the shadowtroopers was based at the abandoned Imperial listening outpost on [[Kejim]] and Fyyar's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], ''[[Doomgiver]]''. Desann had experimented with imbuing [[Empire Youth]]s, who had little potential in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], with [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] powers.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />

Shadowtroopers met their masters' expectations to the extent that some stormtroopers resented them, fearing they would soon be replaced. Shadowtroopers were first [[Mission to Cairn Installation|deployed]] in the [[Cairn Installation]] against [[Kyle Katarn]]. Several others were stationed on ''Doomgiver'' to protect the ship.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />

The majority of shadowtroopers were dispatched to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] with Desann for the [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn)|assault]] on [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]]. With the aid of Kyle Katarn, all of the shadowtroopers dispatched were either killed or taken into custody, and Desann was slain in the battle.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />

After the death of Fyyar and the destruction of ''Doomgiver'', the project was halted indefinitely.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:ShadowTrooper-NEGWT.png|100px|thumb|Early concept art of the Shadowtrooper armor]]
Early incarnations of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] featured lightsaber-wielding stormtroopers. It is unknown if the shadowtroopers were based on [[Cuis clone|this concept]].

In ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'', a defeated shadowtrooper would drop an Artusian crystal on the ground, which could temporarily raise Kyle Katarn's Force energy. Disintegrating a shadowtrooper corpse with the [[DXR-6 disruptor rifle]] will make it drop another Artusian crystal.
